Short title and commencemeDt. - (1) These regulations may be called the Prasar Bharati (Broadcasting Corporation o f India) (Akashvani News Reader-cum- Translator posts) Service Regulations, 2002. (2) They shall come into force on the date o f their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Application. - These regulations shall apply to the posts specified in column 1 o f the Schedule annexed hereto. 3, Initial Constitution : All persons appointed on or before the commencement o f these regulations holding the posts o f News Reader-cum-Translator Grade-1, News Reader-cum Translator Grade-11 and News Reader-cum-Translator Grade-IU on regular basis shall be deemed to have been appointed under these regulations to the corresponding posts. The service rendered by them before the commencement o f these regulations shall be taken into account for promotion to the next higher grade 4. N u m b e r o f p o sts an d sca les o f p ay. - The num ber o f posts and their scales o f pay shall be as .specified in colum ns 2 and 3 o f the Schedule aforesaid. -- 7 of 14 -- TliE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY | , TH— S e c . 4J 5, M e th o d o f re cru itm e n t, a g e U inil, e d u c a tio n a l an d o th er q u a lific a tio n s etc - T he m ethod o f recruitm ent, age limit, educational and other qualifications and other m atters relating thereto shall be as specified in colum ns 3 to 11 o f the Schedule aforesaid, 6, D isq u a lific a tio n . - N o person- (a) vvho, has entered into or contracted a m arriage with a person having a spouse living; or (b) w ho, having a spouse living, has entcied into or contracted a m arriage w itn any person. shall be eligible for appointm ent to the said p o s ts .
